title: Standalone CatBoost categorical ensemble
summary: The best runs rely on AutoGluon GBM/XGB.
rationale: The best runs rely on AutoGluon GBM/XGB. Public tabular guidance and CatBoost references highlight ordered categorical target statistics and complementary errors, which fit this dataset’s Driver, Race, Compound, and engineered crosses.
implementation_hint: Train a separate CatBoostClassifier with native categorical columns and high-cardinality crosses such as Driver_Race, Race_Compound, Driver_Compound_Stint, TyreLifeBin_Compound, and Year_Race. Blend predictions with the best AutoGluon model using validation-optimized rank or probability weights.
expected_effect: Likely small AUC gain from better handling of categorical strategy priors and ensemble diversity.
risk: CatBoost may be slower and can overfit rare driver/race combinations unless depth, l2_leaf_reg, and early stopping are conservative.
disabled_reason: Disabled because an external duplicate-detection mechanism marked this hypothesis as duplicate of an existing hypothesis.
